title: Strict TSConfig, TypeScript 7 Defaults, and Project Graphs · Contract Lens: Strict Options
summary: Create a clean multi-package configuration that fails on unsafe boundaries, unused work, and incompatible module assumptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts strict options increment in a strict TypeScript 7 project configuration. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, useUnknownInCatchVariables, and override checks from actual risk.
Use augmentation or declaration merging only for owned, documented extension points with load-order evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
